mapper.select: select hour(create_time) as xdata, count(*) as ydata from sys_entry_api_log where DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y%m%d') = #{curDate} group by hour(create_time)
select app_id as id, hour(push_time) as xdata, count(*) as ydata from sys_push_log where DATE_FORMAT(push_time, '%Y%m%d') = #{curDate} group by app_id, hour(push_time)
select DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') as xdata, count(*) as ydata from sys_entry_api_log where DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y%m%d') >= #{lastMonthDate} group by DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d')

select app_id as id, DATE_FORMAT(push_time, '%m-%d') as xdata, count(*) as ydata from sys_push_log where DATE_FORMAT(push_time, '%Y%m%d') >= #{lastMonthDate} group by app_id, DATE_FORMAT(push_time, '%m-%d')
select entry_api_id as id,count(*) as ydata from sys_entry_api_log GROUP BY entry_api_id;
